text:
Market today: The mood is a mix of geopolitical tension from U.S. strikes in Iran and optimism for tech, specifically cybersecurity, driven by positive AI spending comments. The real driver for your book remains the evolving AI narrative, which is seeing mixed signals but a clear boost for cybersecurity.

Your holdings: SOXL (-30.59%) and SPAL (-36.78%) are in deep red and flagged "SELL/NEW." Both are leveraged ETFs, meaning drawdowns are amplified, especially on margin. SMH (-5.67%) is also down, keep an eye on it.

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and how they impact broad market sentiment, which can quickly hit your leveraged positions. Also, monitor cybersecurity stocks for continued momentum.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged losses aggressively and stay nimble given the volatile market and your concentrated, margined book.
plays: Trim SOXL (-30.59%, SELL status) to reduce exposure to this leveraged, decaying asset; respect its stop at 200.
SPAL is new and -36.78%. Consider trimming this leveraged ETF to manage risk, honoring its stop at 21.38.
Hold CRWD (+17.16%) to capitalize on the cybersecurity rally, but keep its stop at 147.5 in mind.
